theme.name: Slack Key
theme.notes: G major, slack-key-influenced. Two voices: lyrical melody with neighbor-tone movement over a deliberately static alternating root-fifth bass. Harmony stays diatonic/simple by design (per Manuel: resist Piston-style voice-leading complexity here) — the color is meant to come from open-string ring/patch choice, not from theme-level chord extensions. v2: intervals corrected to semitones (per motif.py docstring: 'Semitone steps between successive notes') confirmed against harmony.py ionian scale [0,2,4,5,7,9,11]. Previous version used scale-step counting by mistake; secondary motif was generating a root-third movement instead of root-fifth.
